summary: Plan-only PR remediation inventory: three small/medium contributor PRs have concrete branch-repair paths before final merge review; one XL cron refactor needs maintainer judgment; one benchmark-helper PR is not mergeable from this worker because required merge-preflight proof is missing.

actions.reason: Repair the contributor branch narrowly, rerun focused media/provider checks plus check:changed, run Codex /review, and only then reconsider merge.
This crosses the job's broad_code_delta and active_author_followup human gates; do not repair or merge from this plan shard without maintainer direction on scope and conflict order.
Repair by refreshing the branch onto current main, rerunning root-help tests and changed checks, then run Codex /review before any merge recommendation.
The patch may be mergeable after maintainer review and required preflight, but this worker cannot emit merge_candidate without complete merge_preflight proof.
Repair the contributor branch against current main, rerun memory-wiki query/compile/status tests plus changed checks, run Codex /review, then reconsider merge.
Provide a cluster-scoped repair artifact for the three narrow contributor-branch repairs while keeping unclear or proof-missing PRs out of automation.

needs_human: #85394: XL cron-tool refactor has waiting-on-author status, merge-risk labels, conflict comments, and broad code delta requiring maintainer scope/conflict-order judgment.
#85400: one-file benchmark-helper PR lacks complete merge_preflight proof, including passed Codex /review and addressed-review-findings evidence.
